verdict: Strong GTM ops foundation; analyst title and ML-heavy scope below target seniority band.

title: Senior Customer Success Manager
description: <p>Individuals in the Customer Success Manager role have a passion for technology and the ambition to dive head-first into new challenges. We are looking for someone who can thrive with a high level of ambiguity and operate autonomously while maintaining a customer centric approach and helping to build the program. In this role you will also become a main point of contact for MongoDB end use
verdict: Senior CSM at tier-1 SaaS, Germany-based, perfect profile match. Take it.

title: Marketing Operations Manager
